Definition: broad taxonomic group as printed in Table 1

Definition: common name of the species as printed
species scientific binomial as printed in Table 1

Definition: acoustic description of the vocalisation as printed (loudness / tonality / frequency / duration / repetition)
Note: verbatim from Table 1; NA where not given

Definition: source reference(s) for the play vocalisation report
play-vocalisation feature category coded by colour in Figure 1: panting_heavy_breathing / hissing / high_pitched_tonal / purring_grumbling / ultrasonic / mixed / none / not_in_figure
Note: transcribed from Figure 1 colour key; 'mixed' = hatched (vervet); 'none' = uncoloured tip; 'not_in_figure' = row not depicted (ferret); verify against the figure

Definition: Y if Figure 1 marks the species with a black diamond (loud play vocalisation), else N (blank if not in Figure 1)
